opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up with this pounding headache at the back of my head, my nose started bleeding out of nowhere, and I feel incredibly dizzy. I checked my blood pressure machine and the number was really high — I'm scared something is wrong.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache has got worse over the last few hours, I had a nosebleed, and my home blood pressure reading frightened me.

symptom_narrative.onset: woke up this morning with a dull ache at the back of the head that has been building over the last four hours
symptom_narrative.duration: about four hours and getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a throbbing, pounding pain across the back of the head
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad now, much worse than when I woke up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the back of my head, around the base of the skull
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: started dull first thing in the morning and has steadily worsened
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around suddenly makes me feel more dizzy
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a nosebleed that came on its own and stopped after about ten minutes of pinching it, feeling dizzy and lightheaded especially if I get up quickly, and my heart has felt like it's pounding on and off for the last month
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt my heart racing and got tired easily over the past month or so
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm just sitting resting, still holding a tissue to my nose

past_medical_history.how_managed: was on a blood pressure tablet but I stopped it about six months ago because I felt fine

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one small tablet, can't recall the exact strength

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I do snack on salty things, there are chips and crackers around the house
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own and I've been quite anxious since I saw the blood pressure number

objective_data_offered.value: 200/115 on my home blood pressure cuff a little earlier
objective_data_offered.timing: measured at home shortly before the call
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-taken on an unvalidated home cuff; technique and cuff calibration not confirmed

objective_data_offered.value: flushed face, looks anxious, keeps rubbing the back of the neck and is holding a tissue to the nose
packets of salty snacks visible on the table and a home blood pressure cuff sitting nearby
